page_metadata.biotools__summary:
CDASOR is a Python page for the algorithm of the same name for predicting circRNA-disease association using convolutional and recurrent neural networks. 
proving circRNA-disease association prediction by sequence and ontology representations with convolutional and recurrent neural networks.

License either MIT, or GPLv3 or later
